title: Fuzzy AI — LinkedIn Social Selling & AI SDR Platform
excerpt: Fuzzy AI turns LinkedIn engagement into booked meetings. Automate outreach, build authority, and convert warm prospects — no cold messaging needed.
content_html:
We're live on Product Hunt today. Support us here.

Built to scale trust

Great sales relationships take time to build. Fuzzy gives you that time back by turning LinkedIn engagement into warm prospect lists, building familiarity through content, and automating personalised outreach and follow-ups, saving your team 60% of their time.

Trusted by 150+ high-growth teams at SaaS, EdTech, and Fintech companies

Newsletter

Short notes on relationship-first outbound, LinkedIn selling, and modern GTM systems.

Quick answer

Fuzzy is a relationship-first sales platform for LinkedIn. Instead of blasting cold messages, your reps build familiarity with target buyers through content and engagement first — then Fuzzy automates personalised outreach that sounds like your best rep, not a bot. Teams see 2–3x higher reply rates.

  • Warm before you reach out
  • Messages in your voice
  • Meetings booked, account safe

Sign up here

How it works

Used by B2B sales teams to increase reply rates by up to 3x without damaging LinkedIn accounts or brand reputation.

Relationship-First Social Selling

Unlike outbound tools that start with cold lists, Fuzzy starts with real LinkedIn engagement, so reps are recognized before they ever send a message. Fuzzy automates the "warm-up" phase by replacing the noisy general feed with a private Prospect-Only Feed, allowing you to engage directly with target decision-makers. By using our Mutual Engagement Boost to stay at the top of their algorithms and maintaining a consistent presence, you build Trust at Scale. Teams see 2–3x higher reply rates compared to traditional cold outbound.

Hyper-Personalised Messages

Most automation feels cold. Fuzzy AI analyses your brand voice, prospect context, and real-time insights to generate hyper-personalised LinkedIn messages, emails, and comments so personal, they'll think you spent an hour researching them.

Unlimited Lead Discovery

Powered by Sales Navigator

Stop hitting the "Daily limit" wall on Sales Navigator. Our intelligent prompter pulls your ideal buyers directly from Sales Navigator data, giving your reps a "Super-Rep" edge. Fully compliant with LinkedIn's terms and built with safety guardrails to protect your account.

Engagement, Not Spam

Your brand is everything. Fuzzy AI doesn't blast templates. It learns your specific brand voice and engages with prospects via comments and InMails first to build a warm relationship before the "ask."

Account Safety

No. Fuzzy is built to work inside LinkedIn's guidelines. We don't use the aggressive bots or scrapers that get accounts flagged — we use smart prompting and genuine engagement, with safety guardrails on every action.

  • No banned automation

    No headless bots or scraping that violate LinkedIn’s terms.

  • Human-paced activity

    Built-in limits and natural pacing keep activity within safe thresholds.

  • You stay in control

    Review and approve outreach before it sends — nothing goes out blind.

The easiest way to turn LinkedIn engagement into qualified sales meetings.

STEP ONE

Craft Posts that attract your ICP

Eliminate guesswork by using our Winning Hook Library. Generate dozens of high-performing hooks in seconds using templates proven to get millions of views.

STEP TWO

Stay Top-of-Mind Automatically

Stay top-of-mind without the manual grind. Post consistently during peak hours whilst you focus on high-value selling and closing.

STEP THREE

Convert Engagers

Close the loop automatically. Fuzzy tracks every 'like' and 'comment' to move your most active prospects into personalised outreach sequences instantly.

The Transformation

What used to take 7 hours now takes 1. So you can spend more time selling.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to common questions about our sales automation, LinkedIn social selling, and hyper personalisation features.

Still have questions about Fuzzy AI?

View Blogs

Founder's note

I started Fuzzy AI because I watched my best sales reps burn out by spending 30 hours a week doing "copy-paste" outreach and fighting lead limits.

It felt like we were paying for Ferraris but driving them in school zones.

I built Fuzzy to take the robotic tasks off their plates so they could get back to what they actually love: building relationships and winning deals.

Today, we help teams do more with less, without ever sacrificing the human connection that makes sales work.

In the spotlight

From pitching live on Meet the Drapers to keynote stages — building Fuzzy in the open.

Limited Beta Access

Reclaim 60% of Your Sales Reps' Time

Stop paying your best closers to do data entry. Let Fuzzy AI handle the research and the first touch, while your team handles the revenue.

blocks.html_en: Stop paying your best closers to do data entry. Let Fuzzy AI handle the research and the first touch, while your team handles the revenue.

sentences.zh: 停止支付最好的数据输入费用。

content_html_zh:
我们今天直播 Product Hunt。 在这里支持我们。

建立规模信任

良好的销售关系需要时间来建立。 Fuzzy 通过将 LinkedIn 参与度转变为热情的潜在客户列表、通过内容建立熟悉度以及自动化个性化外展和跟进，为您的团队节省 60% 的时间，从而为您节省时间。

受到 SaaS、EdTech 和 Fintech 公司 150 多个高增长团队的信赖

通讯

关于关系优先的外向、LinkedIn 销售和现代 GTM 系统的简短说明。

快速解答

Fuzzy 是 LinkedIn 的关系优先销售平台。 您的销售代表不会发布冷冰冰的消息，而是首先通过内容和参与度来熟悉目标买家，然后 Fuzzy 会自动进行个性化推广，这听起来像是您最好的销售代表，而不是机器人。 团队的回复率提高了 2-3 倍。

  • 伸出手之前先温暖一下
  • 用你的声音传达信息
  • 会议已预订，帐户安全

在这里注册

它是如何运作的

B2B 销售团队使用它可将回复率提高多达 3 倍，而不会损害 LinkedIn 帐户或品牌声誉。

关系至上的社交销售

与从冷列表开始的出站工具不同，Fuzzy 从真正的 LinkedIn 参与开始，因此代表在发送消息之前就会被识别。 Fuzzy 通过用私人的仅限潜在客户的 Feed 替换嘈杂的一般 Feed，自动执行“预热”阶段，使您能够直接与目标决策者互动。 通过使用我们的相互参与提升来保持算法的领先地位并保持一致的存在，您可以建立大规模的信任。 与传统的冷呼出相比，团队的回复率提高了 2-3 倍。

超个性化消息

大多数自动化感觉很冷。 Fuzzy AI 分析您的品牌声音、潜在客户背景和实时见解，以生成超个性化的 LinkedIn 消息、电子邮件和评论，这些信息如此个性化，他们会认为您花了一个小时研究它们。

无限的潜在客户发现

由销售导航器提供支持

停止触及 Sales Navigator 上的“每日限额”墙。 我们的智能提示器直接从销售导航器数据中提取您的理想买家，为您的销售代表提供“超级销售代表”优势。 完全符合LinkedIn的条款，并内置安全护栏来保护您的帐户。

参与，而不是垃圾邮件

您的品牌就是一切。 模糊人工智能不会破坏模板。 它会了解您特定的品牌声音，并首先通过评论和 InMail 与潜在客户互动，在“询问”之前建立热情的关系。

账户安全

不会。Fuzzy 是为了在 LinkedIn 的指导方针内工作而构建的。 我们不使用会标记帐户的攻击性机器人或抓取工具 - 我们使用智能提示和真正的参与，并在每个操作中设置安全护栏。

  • 没有被禁止的自动化，没有无头机器人或违反 LinkedIn 条款的抓取。
  • 人性化的活动内置限制和自然节奏将活动保持在安全阈值内。
  • 您保持控制权，在发送之前审核并批准外展活动——没有什么是盲目的。

将 LinkedIn 参与转化为合格的销售会议的最简单方法。

第一步

制作吸引您 ICP 的帖子

使用我们的 Winning Hook 库消除猜测。 使用经证明可获得数百万次浏览的模板，在几秒钟内生成数十个高性能挂钩。

第二步

自动保持首要考虑

无需手动打磨即可保持首要考虑。 在高峰时段持续发帖，同时专注于高价值销售和成交。

第三步

转化参与者

自动关闭循环。 Fuzzy 会跟踪每一个“喜欢”和“评论”，以便立即将您最活跃的潜在客户转移到个性化的推广序列中。

转变

以前需要 7 个小时，现在只需 1 个小时。 这样您就可以花更多的时间进行销售。

对 Fuzzy AI 仍有疑问吗？

View Blogs

创始人致辞

我创办 Fuzzy AI 是因为我看到我最好的销售代表每周花费 30 个小时进行“复制粘贴”外展工作并与销售线索限制作斗争，从而精疲力竭。

感觉就像我们花钱买了法拉利，却在学校区域驾驶它们。

我建立 Fuzzy 是为了让他们摆脱机器人任务，这样他们就可以回到他们真正喜欢的事情上：建立关系和赢得交易。

如今，我们帮助团队事半功倍，同时又不牺牲促进销售工作的人际关系。

在聚光灯下

从 Meet the Drapers 现场推介到主题演讲舞台——公开构建 Fuzzy。

有限的测试版访问权限

节省销售代表 60% 的时间

停止支付最好的数据输入费用。 让 Fuzzy AI 处理研究和第一次接触，而您的团队负责收入。
